description_long: This object consists of three standard traffic cones, each featuring a tall, conical orange body with two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling the upper and middle sections. The cones have a slightly hollow, rounded tip at the top and a broad, circular black base that provides stability and weight. The orange plastic surface is matte and smooth, with the white stripes appearing slightly more reflective. The cones are free of any visible logos, text, or additional markings. The bases are thick and appear to be made of a denser, rubber-like material, contrasting with the lighter plastic of the cone body. The overall condition of the cones is clean and new, with no visible signs of wear, fading, or damage.
description: A set of three orange traffic cones with white reflective stripes and wide black rubber bases, appearing clean and new.
description_view_0: Three upright traffic cones are visible, showing their orange bodies, white stripes, and black bases clearly.
description_view_1: The cones are viewed from a lower angle, with one cone lying on its side, emphasizing the solid black base and the hollow tip.
description_view_2: This view highlights the circular bases and the alignment of the white stripes, with one cone lying down and the others upright.
description_view_3: The cones are seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the tops and the arrangement of the cones, with one cone on its side.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes, one near the top and one around the middle of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded and hollow, colored orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, circular, and flat, made of thick black rubber for stability and weight, with a smooth texture and no visible patterns.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any part of the cones.
attribute_condition: The cones appear new, clean, and free of visible wear, fading, cracks, or damage.
